1: # Implementation Plan - Fix Puja Page Showing Store Items
2: 
3: The mobile app's Puja page currently lists products like "13 Mukhi Rudraksha" under the "All Puja" section. These items are store products fetched from the `website_pooja_products` database table. Instead, the page should fetch and display actual pujas from the `general_poojas` table (such as "Kedarnath Puja", "Tirupati Puja", etc.).
4: 
5: ## Proposed Changes
6: 
7: ### Mobile App Code base
8: 
9: #### [MODIFY] [puja.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/(tabs)/puja.tsx)
10: - Modify `loadGeneralPoojas` to query from `general_poojas` instead of `website_pooja_products`.
11: - Update the columns mapping so that:
12:   - `title` maps to `p.title`
13:   - `originalPrice` maps directly to `p.original_price`
14:   - `offerPrice` and `price` map directly to `p.offer_price`
15:   - `rating` maps to `p.rating`
16:   - `reviews` maps to `p.reviews`
17:   - `provider` maps to `p.provider`
18:   - `description` maps to `p.tagline`
19:   - `image` maps to `p.image_url`
20: - Update the realtime subscription channel `generalSubscription` to listen to changes on the `general_poojas` table.
21: 
22: #### [MODIFY] [all_pujas.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/all_pujas.tsx)
23: - Modify `loadGeneralPoojas` to query from `general_poojas` instead of `website_pooja_products`.
24: - Update the columns mapping accordingly to use `general_poojas` schema.
25: - Update the realtime subscription channel `productsSubscription` to listen to the `general_poojas` table.
26: 
27: #### [MODIFY] [puja_detail.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/puja_detail.tsx)
28: - In the `loadPujaDetails` effect, add `general_poojas` table as a fallback query option after checking `one_rupee_poojas` and before checking `website_pooja_products` (or replacing/inserting it in the fallback logic).
29: - Since `general_poojas` does not have a `name` column, the existing `isWebsiteProduct` check (`const isWebsiteProduct = ('name' in dbData)`) will correctly evaluate to `false` and map the fields appropriately.
30: 
31: #### [MODIFY] [settings_detail.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/settings_detail.tsx)
32: - Modify `fetchTempleCatalog` to fetch from both `general_poojas` (using `id` and `temple`) and `website_pooja_products` (using `id` and `temple_association`), merging the results into the mapping. This ensures order items booked for both general pujas and store products correctly resolve their corresponding temples.
33: 
34: ## Verification Plan
35: 
36: ### Automated/Manual Verification
37: - Run a node command to test that both tables read correctly.
38: - Ask the user to check their mobile client device to confirm that "ALL PUJA" lists pujas (e.g. Kedarnath, Tirupati) rather than Rudrakshas and that booking details/views work correctly.
39: 
The above content shows the entire, complete file contents of the requested file.
